title: Sweet and Smoky British Duck Breast
description: A twist on traditional British roast duck, with a sweet and smoky glaze. Perfect for a special occasion dinner.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the duck breast until browned on both sides.
Transfer the duck to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the duck is roasting, mix together the sugar, smoked paprika, and apple cider vinegar in a small bowl.
After the duck has roasted for 10 minutes, brush the glaze all over the breast.
Return the duck to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the glaze is caramelized and sticky.
Let the duck rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
